Paramahamsa Nithyananda is revered, regarded, respected and worshipped as the Avatar (living incarnation) of super-consciousness by millions across the globe. He is also the spiritual head of Mahanirvani Peetha, the oldest and largest apex body of Hinduism. 

He and his Sangha (spiritual community) around the globe is serving humanity by reviving the science of completion, science of Enlightenment and manifesting various extraordinary spiritual powers as per the Vedic Agamic tradition of Sanatana Hindu Dharma. He is the author of 300 books, which are translated and published in 500 titles and various international languages. 
His Sangha has a strong presence worldwide through numerous Temples, Adheenams (Temple monastery complex), Gurukuls (Vedic schools), universities, goshalas (cow shelters) established by Him. His live Satsangs (spiritual discourses) are viewed every morning (8am IST) by people from all countries around the world.

What's Docker?
Docker is an open-source engine for building and deploying cloud applications as standalone containers which can run on any server - from the VM on your laptop to the largest EC2 compute instance, and everything in between. Docker is a great building block for deploying web apps, database services, service-oriented architectures, and so on. Learn more about Docker at http://www.docker.com Who should join?
Developers, ops engineers and sys admins using Docker in chennai , India.

Why members should join?
To learn more about Docker through demos and lightning talks To meet other people using Docker in their area What members can expect out of the group?
Well-organized face-to-face meetups with active members of the Docker community willing to share their notes.

group_name: hiSeoulies🎀a safe & supportive community for women in seoul
group_description: **What is hiSeoulies?** hiSeoulies is a women-only community in Seoul, created around **true connections and mindful time**. We bring women together to connect intentionally, share experiences, and spend time together in a way that feels natural, supportive, and meaningful - whether you’re living in Seoul long-term or just visiting. hiSeoulies is about creating spaces where connection can unfold without pressure. Through thoughtfully curated meetups and shared moments, we invite you to slow down, meet like-minded women, and experience Seoul together - not alone. **About the community** hiSeoulies was founded by [Tori](www.instagram.com/toriprk), with the intention of creating a space for true connections and mindful time among women in Seoul. Today, hiSeoulies is supported by a small team of wonderful women living in Seoul who help shape and care for the community on a voluntary basis. Together, we support events, conversations, and spaces where connection can grow naturally and at a gentle pace. hiSeoulies is built with care, intention, and community at its core - and continues to grow through the people who are part of it. **Who is hiSeoulies for?** hiSeoulies is for women who value connection, presence, and shared experiences. This community is a good fit if you are: 🎀 Living in Seoul and looking to build genuine connections 🎀 Visiting Korea and wanting to meet other women along the way 🎀 An expat, student, or digital nomad finding your rhythm in a new city 🎀 Curious about community, shared moments, and connecting beyond surface level No matter where you’re from or how long you’re staying, hiSeoulies is a welcoming and safe space to connect with other women in Seoul. **What can you expect?** We host community-focused events designed to encourage connection and mindful time together. 🍒 **Community Meetups** Casual gatherings in cafés, restaurants, parks, and places around Seoul - space to talk, connect, and simply be together. 🍒 **Shared & Mindful Experiences** Creative, cultural, and mindful activities where we connect while doing something together - including movement, body-focused practices, creative moments, and seasonal experiences. 🍒 **Trips, Day Experiences & Giving Back** Occasional trips beyond the city, shared explorations, and moments where we come together to contribute to life in Seoul through volunteering, supporting local initiatives, and finding ways to connect more deeply with the place we live in. 🍒 **hiSeoulies Community Space** Our private WhatsApp community is where hiSeoulies continues beyond events - a space for staying connected, sharing, supporting each other, and being part of the community in everyday life in Seoul. **How to join** 📍 **Join an event on Meetup** All events are organized and booked directly through Meetup for easier planning and payment. 📲 **Follow us on Instagram** We share updates, community moments, and what we’re currently working on: [click here to find us](https://www.instagram.com/hiseoulies) 💬 **Join our private WhatsApp community** This is our safe space for closer connection, gentle conversations, support, and staying in touch. If you’d like to join, just send us a message on Instagram and we’ll be happy to share the invitation 🤍 We’re really glad you’re here and hope to see you at one of our events soon. See you soon, Seoulies 🎀

group_name: Bangalore - The Purpose of Life in Buddhism
group_description: Are you searching for meaning in your life? Have you ever felt that the happiness in your life never lasts? This Buddhism group has a great, positive, multicultural atmosphere that helps people search for the answers to life's biggest questions. Through the teachings of Buddha, we gain a better understanding of the direction our life needs to take to find its purpose. **WhatsApp group for receiving Buddhism quotes and event announcements:** https://chat.whatsapp.com/IinYaoSLnIEAyTM3BbxKzI In Buddhism, we learn that there are two kinds of happiness. **Relative Happiness** Relative happiness encompasses all the happiness we are familiar with. It includes aspects such as money, status, fame, wealth, family, friends, and loved ones. Politics, economics, medicine, and the arts also contribute to our relative happiness. We pursue this type of happiness every day, hoping that it will provide us with lasting satisfaction. However, due to the transient nature of everything around us, sooner or later, relative happiness deceives us, and we feel suffering. **Absolute Happiness** We all search for enduring happiness, unchanging in old age, sickness, and death. According to Buddha, this everlasting happiness is called Absolute Happiness and represents the true purpose of life for all human beings. Why were we born? Why are we living? What is the purpose of our life? What determines a good fate of happiness, or a bad fate of misfortune? We will have an online session to learn how Buddhism answers these questions. If you want to join us, please fill out this **application form**: https://forms.gle/BvkpiJW5N6x2yjDa9 **WhatsApp group for receiving Buddhism quotes and event announcements:** https://chat.whatsapp.com/IinYaoSLnIEAyTM3BbxKzI If any questions, don't hesitate to get in touch with me: Email: anup.buddhism@gmail.com Call / SMS / WhatsApp: +91 9730294411

WordPress Meetup Tegal adalah tempat untuk berbagi pengetahuan atau pengalaman apa pun seputar WordPress, serta saling bertemunya pengguna/peminat WordPress di Kabupaten/Kota Tegal (Jawa Tengah, Indonesia) dan dari wilayah sekitarnya. Meetup offline rutin diadakan satu bulan sekali tiap tanggal 25 (kecuali ada perubahan) di Trasa Co-Working Space, Slawi. Silakan gabung/join untuk mendapatkan update jadwal kegiatan meetup yang akan datang. WordPress Meetup Tegal sangat inklusif. Artinya, terbuka untuk siapa saja – tidak memandang perbedaan tingkat keahlian, pekerjaan, tingkat pendapatan, kemampuan fisik, latar belakang sosial, gender, agama, dll. WordPress Meetup Tegal merupakan bagian dari program WordPress Chapter resmi yang diorganisir oleh relawan WordPress. [WordPress Global Community Sponsors](https://central.wordcamp.org/global-community-sponsors/) membantu mendanai grup WordPress Meetup dan WordCamp di seluruh dunia. Terima kasih atas dukungannya! **Tentang WordPress dan WordPress Meetup** **Apa itu WordPress?** WordPress adalah sebuah perangkat lunak open source yang dapat Anda gunakan untuk membuat situs web yang menarik, blog, atau aplikasi. Dapat didownload dari [https://id.wordpress.org/download/](https://id.wordpress.org/download/). **Apa itu WordPress Meetup?** WordPress Meetup adalah kegiatan dari sekelompok orang (minimal 2 individu) yang diselenggarakan secara lokal (di suatu tempat tertentu) untuk setidaknya saling berbagi informasi seputar WordPress. Kegiatan dapat diikuti oleh siapa saja tanpa dipungut biaya (100% gratis). Info selengkapnya dapat dibaca di [bit.ly/3NWymYr](https://bit.ly/3NWymYr) dan [https://make.wordpress.org/community/meetups/](https://make.wordpress.org/community/meetups/). Kegiatan WordPress Meetup Tegal dapat menambah pengetahuan seputar WordPress & memperluas koneksi Anda. Yuk gabung, bertemu, berbagi pengetahuan, dan belajar bersama! **Terhubung dengan komunitas kami di WhatsApp**: [wptegal.com/wa](https://wptegal.com/wa)

Whether you're architecting distributed systems, building resilient DevOps pipelines, crafting elegant developer tools, analyzing massive datasets, or shaping the future of AI. **Open Source Meetups Bengaluru is your home for all things open source**. Some meetups feature formal presentations, while others are more relaxed and discussion-driven. Every event is designed to encourage learning, connection, and community. Snacks and stickers included! 🎤 **Interested in speaking**? We’re always looking for meetup speakers! Submit your talk ideas [here](http://www.grafana.com/g/communityengcamp-meetuptocca), and we’ll reach out with next steps if your proposal is accepted. Grafana & Friends meetups aren’t the only way to connect with the community! Explore additional ways to get involved below: **Interact and be heard:** * **Forums**: Do you have a problem, question, or curiosity? Visit our [forums](http://www.grafana.com/g/communityengcamp-meetuptoforums) for a reservoir of knowledge- submit your own questions and answers! * **Community Slack**: Eager for real-time connections with fellow users? Begin a conversation on [Slack](http://www.grafana.com/g/communityengcamp-meetuptoslack).  **Learn:** * **YouTube:** From getting started to exploring newer projects like Pyroscope and Beyla, the [Grafana YouTube channel](http://www.grafana.com/g/communityengcamp-meetuptoyoutube) has what you need to get started!  **Contribute:** * **Github:** Check out our [open github repositories](http://www.grafana.com/g/communityengcamp-meetuptogithub) to report bugs and contribute code * **Meetups and blogs:** We’d love to feature your OSS Grafana Labs use case or story at an upcoming Grafana & Friends meetup or on the Grafana blog! [Submit your idea here](http://www.grafana.com/g/communityengcamp-meetuptocca) and we’ll connect with you on next steps if accepted.  * **Champions:** [Join the Grafana Champions program](https://grafana.com/community/champions/?src=communityengcamp&tech=meetup&pg=community)! It’s designed to recognize and empower individuals who are actively contributing to the growth and success of the Grafana ecosystem. All events hosted by this group and communication on this platform are subject to [Grafana Labs' Events Code of Conduct](https://grafana.com/events/events-code-of-conduct/).

Join Kanban Singapore today and be part of this vibrant community!

■「Okinawa WordPress Meetup」とは 「Okinawa WordPress Meetup」は、WordPressが好きな人が集まって構成される沖縄地域（沖縄本島・離島を含む）のコミュニティです。地元の方はもちろん、沖縄を旅行や出張で訪れている方も大歓迎です。 ■どんな人が参加できるの？ WordPress初心者から上級者まで、どなたでも参加OK！WordPressに興味がある方なら、会社員・フリーランス・学生・求職中、趣味や勉強中の方まで大歓迎です。Webの仕事をしていなくても大丈夫。おひとりでも、気軽に遊びに来てくださいね。観光の合間にふらっと参加するのもOKです。ゆったりとした沖縄らしい雰囲気の中で交流しましょう。 **■スポンサーの皆さま** WordPress グローバルコミュニティスポンサーは、世界中の WordPress Meetup グループや WordCamp の活動を支援しています。 Bluehost、Woo、hosting.com、Jetpack、WordPress.com、Kinsta のご支援に感謝します。 そして、**会場スポンサーとして「**SAKURA innobase Okinawa」を**ご提供いただいている** さくらインターネット株式会社にも感謝申し上げます。 ■行動規範 **1\. 目的** Okinawa WordPress Meetup グループは、自分たちのコミュニティがあらゆる人に対して偽りなくオープンであるべきと考えています。それ故に、私たちは、性別、性的指向、身体障害、民族、宗教、好きな OS、使っているプログラミング言語やテキストエディターにかかわらず、すべての人に友好的で安全で快適な環境を提供していくことに全力で取り組んでいるのです。 この倫理綱領では、私たちが参加者に対して求めている振る舞いと、受け入れ難い行為を行うとどのような結果を招くのか説明しています。 誰にとっても安全で有益なコミュニティ体験の場が実現するよう、私たちは、すべてのスポンサー、ボランティア、スピーカー、一般来場者、それ以外の関係者にも協力をお願いしています。 **2\. オープンソース市民** 私たちの役割とコミュニティ全体との関わり合いを関係者が認め強化するように働き掛けることで、オープンソース市民を増やしていくことがこの行動規範のもう一つの目的です。 この目的を達成するために、Okinawa WordPress Meetup グループは、称賛に値する市民の推薦を受け付けています。 私たちのコミュニティが心地良く友好的な場であることを保証し、すべての関係者が最大限に貢献してくれるよう働き掛けるため、人一倍の努力をしている「市民」を見かけたら、私たちに推薦してください。イベントオーガナイザーに直接伝えるか、オンラインから推薦してください。 **3\. 求められる振る舞い** * 思いやりを持ち、礼儀正しく、協力し合うこと。 * 他人が屈辱的、差別的、迷惑に感じる振る舞いや発言はやめること。 * 周囲の状況や、仲間である他の参加者に気を配ること。 * 危険な状況や、苦しんでいる人に気づいたらコミュニティ主催者に伝えること。 このように振る舞うことが、Okinawa WordPress Meetup グループを形作ることを助け、結果的にユーザーグループがあなた自身の場にもなっていきます。 **4\. 受け入れ難い行為** 受け入れ難い行為は以下の行動を含みます。 Okinawa WordPress Meetup グループのメンバー、もしくは関連するイベントによる、他人への威嚇、迷惑、虐待、差別、名誉毀損、屈辱行為。 Okinawa WordPress Meetup グループが使う会場は一般の人々も使うことが考えられます。そういった場所では、一般のお客さまにも礼儀正しくしてください。 迷惑行為には以下の振る舞いが含まれます。 * 性別、性的指向、人種、宗教、身体障害に関する、言葉による攻撃的な意見。 * 公共空間 (プレゼンテーションのスライドを含む) における、裸体や性的画像の不適切な使用。 * 意図的な脅迫、ストーキング、尾行。 * 嫌がらせとなるような写真・ビデオ撮影と録音。 * トークやイベントの持続した途絶を招く行為。 * 不適切な身体的接触と、不愉快な性的注目。 **5\. 受け入れ難い行為が招く結果** 受け入れ難い行為は、一般来場者、オーガナイザー、会場スタッフ、スポンサー、Okinawa WordPress Meetup グループの会場に来ている会場の他のお客さま、であろうとなかろうと許されません。 受け入れ難い行為を止めるように要求された人は、直ぐに従うことが求められます。 受け入れ難い行為に関与した参加者がでた場合、最大で「事前警告や参加費などの返金をせずにコミュニティからの除名処分」に至るまで、コミュニティ主催者は自身が適切だと判断した行動を取ることができます。 **6\. 受け入れ難い行為を目撃したり、被害に遭った場合は** 受け入れ難い行為を受けたり、他の人がそのような行為を受けているのに気付いたり、その他にも気になることがあれば、できるだけ早くコミュニティ主催者にお知らせいただくか、オンラインで起こった出来事であれば、「問題の報告」に記入をお願いします。 Okinawa WordPress Meetup グループチームは、参加者が、会場の警備担当者や地元の警察と連絡を取るのを助けたり、付き添う人を用意したり、受け入れ難い行為にさらされている人がコミュニティで安心できるよう手助けをします。 **7\. 適用範囲** すべてのコミュニティ参加者、スポンサー、ボランティア、スピーカー、一般来場者、その他のゲストが、すべての会場および関連する社交イベントにおいて、当然のこととして、この行動規範に従うことを期待しています。 **8\. 連絡先情報** グループページの「メンバーに連絡する」ボタンより運営者に連絡してください。 リンク：https://www.meetup.com/okinawa-wordpress-meetup/messages/send/ **9\. ライセンスと帰属** Open Source Bridge の素晴らしい著作物を取り入れる形で、この行動規範は作られています。オリジナルは http://opensourcebridge.org/about/code-of-conduct/ で入手でき、クリエイティブ·コモンズ表示-継承ライセンスのもとでリリースされています。 原文: https://make.wordpress.org/community/handbook/meetup-organizer/resources/code-of-conduct/ 翻訳 GitHub: https://github.com/jawordpressorg/community-handbook/blob/master/meetup-organizer/resources/code-of-conduct.md 更新日： 2025年8月13日 ■What is "Okinawa WordPress Meetup"? "Okinawa WordPress Meetup" is a community in Okinawa (including the main island and remote islands) where people who love WordPress gather. Locals are welcome, as well as those visiting Okinawa for travel or business. ■Who can join us? Anyone who is into WordPress — from complete beginners to experienced developers — is welcome! Whether you’re living here or just visiting, working in the web industry or learning for fun, please feel free to join us. **■Our Sponsors** WordPress Global Community Sponsors help fund WordPress Meetup groups and WordCamps around the world. Thank you to Bluehost, Woo, hosting.com, Jetpack WordPress.com and Kinsta for their support! We also appreciate the support of SAKURA Internet as our venue sponsor. **■Code of Conduct** **1\. Purpose** The WordPress Okinawa User Group believes our community should be truly open for everyone. As such, we are committed to providing a friendly, safe and welcoming environment for all, regardless of gender, sexual orientation, disability, ethnicity, religion, age, caste, social class, preferred operating system, programming language, or text editor, among other identifying characteristics. This code of conduct outlines our expectations for participant behavior as well as the consequences for unacceptable behavior. We invite all sponsors, volunteers, speakers, attendees, and other participants to help us realize a safe and positive community experience for everyone. **2\. Open Source Citizenship** A supplemental goal of this code of conduct is to increase open source citizenship by encouraging participants to recognize and strengthen the relationships between what we do and the community at large. In service of this goal, the WordPress Okinawa User Group organizers will be taking nominations for exemplary citizens. If you see someone who is making an extra effort to ensure our community is welcoming, friendly, and encourages all participants to contribute to the fullest extent, we want to know. You can nominate someone by talking to the event organizer or online. **3\. Expected Behavior** Be considerate, respectful, and collaborative. Refrain from demeaning, discriminatory or harassing behavior and speech. Be mindful of your surroundings and of your fellow participants. Alert community organizers if you notice a dangerous situation or someone in distress. Participate in an authentic and active way. In doing so, you help to create WordPress Okinawa User Group and make it your own. **4\. Unacceptable Behavior** Unacceptable behaviors include: intimidating, harassing, abusive, discriminatory, derogatory or demeaning conduct by any members of WordPress Okinawa User Group and related events. All WordPress Okinawa User Group venues may be shared with members of the public; please be respectful to all patrons of these locations. Harassment includes: offensive verbal comments related to gender, sexual orientation, race, religion, disability; inappropriate use of nudity and/or sexual images in public spaces (including presentation slides); deliberate intimidation, stalking or following; harassing photography or recording; sustained disruption of talks or other events; inappropriate physical contact, and unwelcome sexual attention. **5\. Consequences Of Unacceptable Behavior** Unacceptable behavior will not be tolerated whether by other attendees, organizers, venue staff, sponsors, or other patrons of the WordPress Okinawa User Group venues. Anyone asked to stop unacceptable behavior is expected to comply immediately. If a participant engages in unacceptable behavior, the community organizers may take any action they deem appropriate, up to and including expulsion from the community without warning or refund. **6\. What To Do If You Witness Or Are Subject To Unacceptable Behavior** If you are subjected to unacceptable behavior, notice that someone else is being subject to unacceptable behavior, or have any other concerns, please notify a community organizer as soon as possible or fill out an incident report if the incident was online. The WordPress Okinawa User Group team will be available to help participants contact venue security or local law enforcement, to provide escorts, or to otherwise assist those experiencing unacceptable behavior to feel safe in the community. **7\. Scope** We expect all community members, sponsors, volunteers, speakers, attendees, and other guests to abide by this code of conduct at all venues and related social events. **8\. Contact Information** Please contact the organizers using the "Contact a member" button on the group page. Link: https://www.meetup.com/okinawa-wordpress-meetup/messages/send/ **9\. License And Attribution** This Code of Conduct is heavily borrowed from the awesome work of Open Source Bridge. The original is available at https://opensource.com/code-of-conduct and is released under a Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike license.

group_name: Power of Thought Seoul Meetup Group
group_description: Living abroad can be exciting, but it can also bring fear, self-doubt, and anxiety—especially when speaking in public, expressing yourself in another language, or navigating unfamiliar social situations. This class is designed to help Korean participants understand how thoughts shape emotions, confidence, and behavior, and how changing internal dialogue can create real confidence from within. In this online session, we will explore how fear develops in the mind, why public speaking and social situations can feel overwhelming abroad, and how to gently retrain thought patterns that limit self-expression. The focus is not performance or perfection, but emotional safety, clarity, and self-trust. This class is especially helpful for: Koreans living or studying abroad Those struggling with fear of public speaking or self-expression Individuals wanting to build confidence in international or multicultural environments Anyone interested in personal growth, mindset, and emotional resilience The session is guided in a calm, supportive, and non-judgmental space. Concepts are explained clearly and slowly so they are easy to understand, even if English is not your first language. Reflection, awareness, and practical mental tools will be shared to help participants feel more grounded and confident in real-life situations. This is not therapy, but an educational and empowering experience focused on understanding the power of thought and how it influences confidence, fear, and identity while living abroad. ✨ You are welcome just as you are. No experience is needed.

Motivation Insights: If you began the challenge, share what inspired you to do so. Your motivation and the factors that pushed you to participate are valuable insights. 3. Evidence of Engagement: Present photos demonstrating your active participation in the challenge. These visual stories allow us to see the challenge through your perspective. 4. We are a group of women who believe in the value of making friends as we adapt to and enjoy the changes in our lives. Please take the time to read the information below. Your application will not be accepted if you do not meet the requirements. Many of these are to protect you and other members from predators, scammers and net-workers. THIS GROUP SUITS women: \* who are over 55 \* retired or semi-retired \* who may be single, widowed, divorced, separated \* live north of the river, or are willing to travel. THE GROUP AIMS to provide a safe place for women over 55 who wish to socialise with other like-minded ladies. \* We encourage enjoyable conversations and company. \* Provide our members with opportunities to meet other women and make new friends. \* Encourage members to share their interests. \* Support members, when ready, to use the Meetup platform to share their interests by organising an event. WE ARE LOOKING FOR ACTIVE MEMBERS, that is, women who intend to use the group. We want you to participate, not simply observe. EVENTS We do not have a Main Organiser whose responsibility it is to provide you with an active and varied social life. The group is managed by a committee of members and all members have a shared responsibility for attending events and enjoying themselves! RANGE OF EVENTS: Because our main Coffee & Chat is every Friday, this allows us to see each other frequently where friendships develop naturally. Some other smaller events may be walks, picnics, coffees, dinners, lunches, special events, movies, theatre, Book Club, games and craft activities etc. EXPECTATIONS: \* In joining the group please understand that every member in this group has the right to be treated with courtesy and respect. \* Please RSVP only when you know you can attend an event. If you change your RSVP, ensure this happens before the cut off time (usually 1 day before) and a message to the event organiser is appreciated. If you change your RSVP after the RSVP's close and before an event begins this will be recorded in Meetup as a 'No Show'. We do understand that unexpected events can occasionally occur. We consider 3 'No Shows' sufficient leeway and will review your membership if you exceed the 3. ‘No Shows' have an impact on a number of people: \* The Hostess needs to confirm numbers with the venue the day before. It is embarrassing if the numbers are less than the booking. \* The venue needs to plan for catering and staff and when people do not turn up it is a loss of business to them and they may be reluctant to take a booking from us in the future. \* Other members - When you pull out at the last minute it disappoints others who may be waitlisted, who may not be able to take advantage of this cancellation. MEMBERSHIP REQUIREMENT 1\. PHOTOGRAPH \* Please upload a recent FULL FACE FRONTAL photo ie a passport photo with a smile! This allows for easy identification when you arrive at an event and the organiser/host is able to introduce you. \* The photograph should have only you in the picture (NO pets, family or friends). Please NO hats, caps or sunglasses to obscure your face. 2\. NAME \(Very Important\!\!\!\!\) \* Apply using your First name and first letter of your surname so we can distinguish you from other members with the same or a similar First name. Pseudonyms will not be accepted. 3\. SHORT BIOGRAPHY \* In your application, write a short biography of yourself of no more than 50 words or 250 characters, just as an introduction to the group. You might wish to include your background, family, interests or anything that identifies your uniqueness. 4\. A COMMITMENT TO ATTEND TWO \(2\) EVENTS WITHIN 6 WEEKS OF APPLICATION \* We ask you to come along to 2 events in the first 6 weeks after your application to see whether this group is for you. \* Once you are happy with the group we confirm your membership by asking you to fill in a membership form and to pay a fee. The fee is then payable at the beginning of subsequent calendar years. This covers the cost of fees to Meetup and entitles every member to be an Organiser, if they so wish. We look forward to meeting you and sharing our company, friendship and interests with you.

We bring you beaches, boat rides, swimming in azure open waters, beautiful kitschy stays, delicious local food, cooking classes, fun cities with a rich history and more! Come along and immerse yourself in this amazing Vietnamese adventure. Trip essence: History | Culture | Food | Rural life | Local tours | Local life | Boat cruise Highlights: - Explore the cities of Hanoi, Saigon and Hoi An and discover the local cuisine and culture through fun tours - Cruise along the Halong Bay on an overnight tour, which includes swimming, kayaking, cave excursions and tai chi on the deck! - Catch a water puppet theatre show and explore the myriad night markets in each of the cities - Be charmed by Hoi An countryside and cycle to the village and have lunch with a local family - Take an engaging tour of the Cu Chi tunnels in Saigon - Explore Saigon nightlife on the back of motorbikes zipping through the city

# GCPUG（ジーシーパグ）／GCPUG kitakyuとは？

「GCPUG（ジーシーパグ）」は、Googleが提供するクラウドプラットフォーム「GCP（Google Cloud Platform）」の普及を目的として、GCPをより良くし、盛り上げていくユーザグループです


「GCPUG kitakyu」は、北九州におけるGCPユーザグループです


※Twitterハッシュタグ「[#gcpug_kitakyu](https://twitter.com/hashtag/gcpug_kitakyu)」でもワイワイやっていきます


# GCPUG（ジーシーパグ）は こういった方々が対象です


★ GCPUG（Google Cloud Platform User Group）で盛り上がっていきたい方


★ Google Cloud Platform（GCP）に関する情報交換したい方


★ Googleの最新技術（インフラ、データ解析、機械学習など）について勉強したい方


★ Google Cloud Platform（GCP）ってなに?？ よくわからない・・・という 初心者の方


★ すでにGoogle Cloud Platform（GCP）をゴリゴリ使ってます！！という 中級者 ～ 上級者の方


★ Google Cloud Platform（GCP）を使っている仲間やエンジニア仲間を見つけたい方


★ スピーカーセッション・Lightning Talksで発表できる場が欲しい方


★ 単純にGoogleのサービスが好きな方　・・・など　


# GCPUG（ジーシーパグ）での禁止事項


GCPUGでは参加者の方々全員が楽しめるように、8つの禁止事項を掲げています


- 他社批判をしない（比較はWelcome）

- お金儲けに使わない

- 金銭のやり取りをしない

- 誹謗中傷をしない

- 迷惑行為をしない

- 内輪ネタにしない

- 来るものを拒まない

- 押し売りをしない

group_name: Taipei Fiction and Creative Non-Fiction Writers Workshop
group_description:
Hello! if you are interested in writing and critiquing other writers' fiction or creative non-fiction, you've come to the right place. We tend to focus on genres like literary fiction, historical fiction, humorous fiction, mainstream, magical realism, and creative non-fiction. (We shy away from memoirs.) We will also take sci-fi fantasy submissions, though if that's really your interest there are other groups that specialize in those genres. If you have a poem or a longer piece of writing, go ahead and submit those too, though longer fiction (over 7000 words) might be critiqued over two or more workshops. We'll meet Sunday afternoons, usually 2:00 until 4 or 5. Look forward to seeing you there!

If you want to submit, please contact me and submit on or before Thursday so that people will have time to read submissions. We'll usually meet at a location near Liuzhangli MRT station, or near Technology Building Station, both on the brown line.

(We have a rule that you must attend at least two sessions and give feedback before submitting any work to critique.)

group_name: Hustle Community in Seoul and Daegu 70s Disco Partner Dance
group_description: Welcome to Hustle Korea! Founded by Young & Christy in 2017, Hustle Korea is more than just a dance group—it's a vibrant community that brings the high-energy fusion of street and social dance to Seoul and Daegu. Wondering what hustle dance is? Imagine a dynamic and energetic partner dance that originated in the disco era of the 1970s. Known for its smooth, flowing movements and fast-paced footwork, hustle incorporates spins, turns, and intricate patterns of various latin dances with 'and 1, 2, 3' count, making it versatile and adaptable to various music genres and dancers of all levels. At Hustle Korea, we aim to create a fun and safe space that aligns with our vision of spreading joy and building a healthy dance culture. We host a variety of activities, from outdoor socials and club parties to regular classes and gatherings. Everyone is welcome—no matter your age, gender, or experience level. EVERY MONDAY at SADANG 19:00 Basic Level Class 20:00 Open Level Class 21:00 Session (Social) If you're new to hustle and wish to join our regular monday schedule, please sign via [google form](https://forms.gle/vf5ZPPBoLSbaLsrq9) for our beginner level class. For any other inquiries, please message us at our official instagram account [@hustlekorea](https://www.instagram.com/HustleKorea/)

We meet at Sunday afternoon biweekly and do prepared speeches, impromptu speeches and evaluations in English and can get both of fun and growth in very cheerful and supportive experience. 아래와 같은 분들이 오시면 많은 도움을 받으실 수 있습니다. * 영어 프리젠테이션을 잘 하고 싶으신 분 : 영어 프리젠테이션은 자주 해보는 수 밖에 방법이 없습니다. 저희 모임에서 많은 경험을 쌓고 자신감을 얻으시면 훌륭한 프리젠터가 되실 수 있습니다. 저희 모임에서 리허설을 하셔도 됩니다. * 보다 체계적으로 Speech를 배워보고 싶으신 분 : 체계화된 교육프로그램에 의해 Speech의 기본기부터 상급레벨까지 다양한 테크닉을 배우고 시도해 볼 수 있습니다. 국제적 규모의 Speech Contest에도 도전해서 Speech Master가 되어보세요. * 무대공포증/발표공포증 있으신 분 : 많은 분들의 따뜻한 격려 속에 공포증을 극복하게 도와 드립니다. * 삶의 에너지가 필요하신 분 : 자기개발을 위해 일요일 오후를 희생하고 오시는 열정적인 회원들의 뜨거운 에너지를 담아 가세요. 정말 값진 일요일 보냈다는 기쁨으로 다음 한주를 시작하세요. And, you can participate in international speech contests held by Toastmasters International as a speaker. I am very nervous during public speech. group_name: Pune Clean Tech & Climate Reality Think tank
group_description:
“We have not inherited the Earth from our parents; we have borrowed it from our children.”

— International Union for the Conservation of Nature, World Conservation Strategy 

— Uttered firstly by: Wendell Berry (American novelist, poet, environmental activist, cultural critic, and farmer)

We live in an era of cosmopolitan citizenship, with a consistent trend and migration towards cities and to its urban lifestyle. We try to adapt to its pace and a far higher level of consumption habits. Dreams and perceptions of tomorrow are the vantage point for today. We probably are the most curious, cultivated and cultured kind existing in this known universe today. Our home, Earth; may be the only habitable planet known to us in this universe and mother earth’s most complex and supportive atmosphere is the only reason we exist. We knowingly or unknowingly replicated in ourselves this same complexity our Mother Nature or its climate carried. In a nutshell we are the nature and probably the lone saviours of it, today.

Our complex nature has derived so many classes of devices to sustain the internal competition and differences. Progress of neo sciences, processes and technologies is flourishing across the earth to ensure lastingness of our species. Being enablers from evolutionary, we now crumble from nature, our progress in certain sensitive but vital areas is harming the souls of very soil, water and air we depend on, for our survival. The paradoxical school of thought has always promoted the selection of either, progress or preservation. Project “Green & Blue” is a platform to provoke the needed equilibrium to progress and preservation, both. We may (and can) call it a Think-tank on sustainable progress.

Green & Blue

It is an eco-commercial platform to support the climate change mitigation policies, cleantech developments, clean energy ideas, resources sustainability, carbon markets and environmental finance. Project “Green & Blue” is going to be one platform of its kind to derive, design and develop project essentials, resources, policy, risk valuation and funding for the climate sensitive movements. Under the ambit of Maytra Noesis Advisors, PLC (Maytra Advisory) and Kshroum Capital Ventures, PLC (Kshroum Ventures), this will be India’s first clean development mechanism, clean energy policy and environmental finance Think-tank being established in Pune, India; partnering with various Global Universities & Institutions, Developmental Multilateral Agencies and Experts, working on Climate Change. This Think-tank will enlighten the way ahead to focussed projects, ideas and entrepreneurs with the collective fund of $ 300 Million, in next 3 years.

Please join us in this ever seen harmonic convergence of intelligence, technology and morality; to gift a more habitable "Tomorrow" to our coming generations.

Welcome to **The Wellness Buddies**—a compassionate community dedicated to holistic transformation and chronic pain relief. Our mission is to empower you with the knowledge, tools, and support to alleviate chronic pain and achieve optimal health. We understand the impact that emotional stress, nutrition, and lifestyle factors have on chronic pain, and we are here to help you address these crucial elements. Through engaging group discussions, expert-led workshops, and hands-on activities, our group focuses on: * Emotional Healing and Pain Relief: Discover cutting-edge self-help techniques to release emotional blockages, manage stress, and reduce the impact of chronic pain on your life. * Nutrition and Physical Health: Learn about the connection between nutrition, inflammation, and chronic pain, and how to nourish your body for optimal healing and wellbeing. * Shared Experiences and Support: Connect with others who understand the challenges of chronic pain, as we exchange personal stories, tips, and insights to uplift and inspire one another on our healing journeys. By participating in The Wellness Buddies, you'll experience: * Reduced chronic pain and increased physical comfort * A more positive outlook on life and enhanced emotional wellbeing * Greater resilience to life's challenges and stressors * Fulfilling relationships that support your healing journey * Enhanced creativity and productivity despite pain * Increased motivation and zest for life * Improvedability to manage chronic pain and maintain focus in your career **Who Will Benefit from This Group?** The Wellness Buddies is ideal for individuals dealing with chronic conditions such as autoimmune disorders, cancer, cholesterol, diabetes, eczema, hair loss, psoriasis, Parkinson's disease, pigmentation, rheumatoid arthritis, stroke, and thyroid disease. If you're experiencing any of these conditions and seeking a supportive community that offers holistic approaches to healing, this group is for you. Our meetup is perfect for those who: * Want to learn how emotional healing can complement their current treatment plan * Seek to improve their nutritional choices to support their body's natural healing process * Are interested in learning stress reduction techniques to manage the challenges of living with a chronic condition * Wish to connect with others facing similar health challenges in a compassionate, judgment-free environment. The Wellness Buddies is a welcoming space for anyone looking to enhance their overall wellbeing, cope with the effects of chronic conditions, and cultivate a more vibrant, balanced life—together.

group_name: Growing Your Business Via Sustainable Referrals
group_description: **Grow Your Business Through Referrals & Real Connections** Hi, I’m Mong San Ping, founder of a mattress business I started 6 years ago. I was an employee most of my life, and I knew I have to start something of my own. I am glad I did it at an age of 46. It is never late, and it is definitely better than never. In the early days of my business, I was comfortable running things the usual way, working on my computer in my store alone, until I realized that real business growth happens when we step out of our comfort zone. I have to, and that’s when I started exploring business networking groups, and it completely changed how I saw growth, collaboration, and referrals. It made me realize the power of being part of a like-minded community. This Meetup group is for **business owners, entrepreneurs, and solopreneurs** who: * Are **new to business** and looking for guidance and support, * Have been running a business for a while but feel **stuck and in need of fresh ideas**, * Are **seeking new directions or sales channels** beyond traditional advertising, * Want to **connect with like-minded people** who believe in growing together, or * Are **employees planning to start** their own small business and want to learn from others’ experiences. Through this community, I’ll be sharing events, workshops, and networking opportunities that I believe can genuinely benefit you. We’ll attend together, learn together, and support each other’s journeys — not just as business owners, but as people striving for growth with purpose and collaboration. If you believe that growth happens best through connections and referrals, not competition ---> you’re in the right place! Let’s build a supportive network that helps each other rise. 💪

Hello All...I thought of creating a safe and inclusive space LGBT entrepreneurs in Delhi to socialize with like-minded people, exchange ideas, network and expand their professional and personal networks in a fun and lively setting that is conducive to conversations. Whether you are a single person startup, a family business heir or have an established  business, you are welcome to join. We are industry agnostic and in fact embrace professional diversity. The idea is to host mixers and guest speakers for people to mingle, socialize and learn from each other's experiences and perspectives. In order to ensure relevance, we will be screening members. In order to gain membership, you must be-

1. Gay, Lesbian, Transgender or Bisexual- Bisexual members must demonstrate that they are willing to engage with the LGBT community. 2. Having a legitimate and active running business that is currently trading. This is not a group for those looking to set up ventures of their own. All members can be rest assured that confidentiality will be strictly respected. It also must be made clear that this is NOT a party to find potential partners for hook-ups and relationships. There are a multitude of other options for such agendas that I am certain you will all know about. We would ask all members to be respectful of one another and treat everyone with courtesy. It is also essential to respect each member's privacy. While networking is an important aspect of the group, we ask you to exercise tact and discretion in order to create a comfortable environment for everyone. This is a social space and therefore any form of business solicitation or promotion is strictly prohibited. Please also be advised that member contact details will not be shared by the group in order to respect privacy.

We have no age restrictions and welcome the diversity. As soon as we get a "reasonable" number of members, we will host a meet. As this group is still a work in progress, I am open to any ideas or potential collaberators.

We’ve spent the past decade in Spain (which still feels like home for part of the year), and now we’re settling in Hua Hin for at least three years while he completes primary school. I’ve been a digital nomad for 12 years, working remotely while embracing a life of travel—though now, I plan our adventures around school holidays. Nothing excites me more than booking the next trip! COME OUT! ISOLATION KILLS. GET CONNECTED. What we do is activity and conversation. The joy of life springs out from the experience of being alive. “People say that what we’re all seeking is a meaning for life. I don’t think that’s what we’re really seeking. I think that what we’re seeking is an experience of being alive, so that our life experiences on the purely physical plane will have resonances with our own innermost being and reality, so that we actually feel the rapture of being alive.” - Joseph Campbell Stop the isolation. We live in a world of isolation and we need to stop it. Come out and meet the people in the flesh. Live a real life. What we need is not the meaning of everything, but the experience of being alive. That’s the best way to blow away the depression, anxiety and feelings of meaninglessness. I believe in this simple principle: “Suit Up and Show Up and Let God do the rest”. Knowledge plays its part, but it doesn't change our lives. Action is the solution to the problem. The solution is always in the solution.

Bhrigu Lake is located at an elevation of around 4,300 meters (14,100 ft) in Kullu district, Himachal Pradesh, India.It is located to the east of the Rohtang Pass and is around 14 kilometers from Gulaba village. The lake can be reached by trek from Gulaba village. The lake is named after Maharishi Bhrigu, one of the seven great sages (Saptarshis).


Day 1: Reporting and Acclimatization at Rumsu. We will get down at Patlikuhal (20 km before Manali and 20 km after Kullu) from bus. Jeep ride to Rumsu base camp(10 km). After freshening up and breakfast all the participants will undergo through registration process for the trek. Post Lunch we will go for an acclimatization walk. Orientation regarding the trek will be given by the chief organizer in the evening. The orientation will cover information like rucksack packing, marching/walking technique and general awareness about a Himalayan Trek. Overnight stay at Rumsu base camp.

Day 2: Drive to Gulaba and trek to Rohlikohli. After morning breakfast we will start with a beautiful jeep ride to Gulaba. The trek commences  from Gulaba towards Rohlikohli camp site. The 5 to 6 hours ascend till Rohlikohli is moderate. There are two streams on the route towards the camp site (Chor Nallah and Kohli Nallah). Rohli Kohli is a beautiful camp site and offers amazing views of Solang Valley. Overnight camp at Rohli Kohli.

Day 3: Trek to Bhrigu Lake Trek commences early in the morning by 7 am after breakfast, for Bhrigu Lake. It takes around 4 hours to reach to Bhrigu Lake. Packed lunch will be done at Bhrigu Lake. Care should be taken that no littering happens over here.  As per the myths, Rishi Bhrigu meditated here and used to take bath in the holy water. We will then start for the descend to Rohlikohli camp site. Overnight stay in tents at Rohlikohli camp site.

Day 4: Descend to Gulaba and Departure from Manali We will start with descend this morning for Gulaba. The descend is easy and takes around 3-4 hours. Departure will be done from Manali bus stand at 5 PM.


  WHAT TO CARRY ? Woolen clothes,Woolen cap,Jackets/Wind-cheater.
Socks(4 pairs)
Thermal wear(1-2 pairs)
Trekking shoes(should have ankle support, good grip and waterproof)
Snow gloves/normal gloves.
Sunglasses/goggles.
Lunch box, water bottle, spoon.
Sunscreen lotion.
Personal medication.
Raincoat.
Torch and batteries.
Rucksack bag  

INCLUSIONS  Tent stay
 Steel Plate, Mug, and rucksack can be issued at the base camp for no extra cost.
 Sleeping bag
 Sleeping mat
 Camping ground booking
 Forest permit
 Meals(Breakfast, Lunch, Snacks, Dinner)  
 

WHAT'S NOT INCLUDED   Cost of Emergency
  Personal Porter Charges
  Bottled water.
  Any personal expense. Instruction for participants :
  Separate stay for male and female.
  Smoking and drinking are strictly prohibited.
  Buying drugs or any illegal material is strictly prohibited, the participant will be detained and handed over to government authority.
  Instructions from Guide should be strictly followed. Note : Participants need to bring the medical certificate from a certified doctor for any respiratory disease and blood pressure.

PAYMENT PROCEDURE : One has to pay through our website.
 A form page will appear where one needs to fill in all the personal details of the person on whose name the booking is being done. Select the payment method (credit card/debit card/net banking) and make the payment.

CANCELLATION POLICY : If for any reason one wishes to cancel his/her trek, an email intimation needs to be sent to kailashrathtreks@gmail.com Cancellation requests will not be taken over a phone call. However, one can phone to check whether the cancellation has been processed. The cancellation charges are as under: ·  Cancellation before 14 days - Rs 2000 ·  Cancellation within 14 days – NO REFUND Note: All cancellation refunds will be processed back to the bank account or the credit card account from which the trek fee has been paid. A processing charge of 2% of the trek fee will be applicable on all refunds.

Walk 'n' Click group started with its first Photowalk in Lalbagh, Bangalore on 19th May, 2012 and since then no turning back with frequent Photowalks/tours every first Sunday of the month visiting various places and freezing the moments... 

The motive of this group is to spread knowledge of photography to all photography enthusiasts without any price tag... 

www.walknclick.in 

#walknclick

Photowalk FAQ's

The very first question comes in mind, what exactly is a Photo walk?

You take yourself and a camera to a designated meeting place to meet up with other photographers, then venture out into an area and snap away! Walk around taking pictures for a couple of hours, then gather at a place, and compare, share, discuss, and have a good time.

Aim: Photography is the main aim of this "walk". Subjects may include architecture, landscape, macro, portraiture (both candid and arranged). There will be learning exercises and also some teaching, if needed.

Is this Photowalk for me?

This Photowalk is for you, if the answer is ‘Yes’ for any of the below questions;

Have you recently bought a Camera or DSLR and wondering what to do with it? Still clicking in Auto Mode and getting basic quality images?

Are the photographic jargons like Shutter speed, Aperture, ISO and Exposure Metering confusing?

Are you planning to buy a camera and looking for some tips and ideas to click better photos?

Do you have reasonable knowledge in photography and want to make friends for future photo shoots?

Benefits of joining us on a photo-walk. 

It's an area that you're already familiar with, being there with a group of creative people can help you see things in ways you hadn't noticed before. Or if it's an area you're unfamiliar with, you can get to know the area with other people who may have lived there all their lives! But the best part (I think) is that you get to meet fellow photographers, make new friends, and have fun!

What do you need to bring?

Yourself and a camera. Doesn't matter what kind. If you want to come with a cell phone, go for it. If you want to show up with a top-of-the-line camera and an assortment of lenses and accessories, Great. Just remember that it is a photo walk, so what you bring with you, you'll be carrying the entire time. Personally, I would recommend bringing fairly minimal gear that's versatile so you don't have to change lenses every five minutes. A bottle of water to walk more…

Fee - No Charges, just carry enough money for parking, entrance, food, etc...We're looking forward to a have great day of fun, photography, and forming new friendships across...

Disclaimer: Members participating in this 'Photo Walk/Tour' are coming on their Own Will, Wish, Risk. Walk 'n' Click and the Organizers, are and will NOT be held Responsible, for any injury, damage to Equipment's whatsoever.

Lets Walk and Click together...

**“Meditation is mind’s gift to itself.”** — Lama Ole Nydahl The [Diamond Way Buddhist Meditation](https://www.diamondway-buddhism.org/) Group in Singapore represents the international non-profit network of more than 640 lay Diamond Way Buddhist centers of the Karma Kagyu Lineage, one of the three ‘old’ schools of Tibetan Buddhism. The Diamond Way Buddhist centers are friendly places where people get easy access to Buddha’s timeless wisdom, learn how to meditate, and develop and share experiences. As a lineage of direct oral transmission from teacher to student, the Karma Kagyu gives central place to meditation and, through interaction with a qualified teacher, can bring about the full and direct experience of the nature of mind. **Everyone is welcome to come experience meditation with us. Our weekly meditations are open to the public and free of charge.**

This group is for people who enjoy hiking and exploring Taiwan’s outdoors. We organize regular hikes around Taiwan, from easy half-day walks to longer and more challenging routes. Pace depends on the hike. Some outings are relaxed with plenty of breaks, while others move faster and require good fitness. The goal is always to enjoy the trail, but not every hike is slow — details are shared in advance so you know what to expect. If you like being outdoors, meeting people, and seeing more of Taiwan on foot, you’re welcome to join.

group_name: How to Improve Relationships with others
group_description: Welcome to HOW TO IMPROVE RELATIONSHIPS WITH OTHERS! This group is for anyone who wants to improve the quality of their relationships—whether with family, friends, partners, colleagues, or clients etc. In today’s fast-paced world, meaningful connection often takes a backseat. Looking for peace, balance, joy, overcome stress, transform and meet other seekers? Welcome to free guided 'Sahaja Yoga' meditation sessions. 


We also have Facebook group to support with more resources. 
Join now! 
https://www.facebook.com/groups/WeMeditateGroup 


Who does it? 
Founded by Shri Mataji Nirmala Devi in 1970 and practiced in over 100 countries. No prior meditation experience is required. 

What is it? 

Sahaja Yoga Meditation is a simple, time-honored technique that lets you tap into that energy and harness its power to become better balanced and better connected to yourself — emotionally, physically, mentally, and spiritually. Anyone can do it. Sahaja Yoga meditation is natural and easy. A structured guided meditation is always included. In this way, you will both experience meditation, and be able to start meditating at home from the first day you start. Beneficial and instructive for both beginners and the experienced. 

Why do it? 

If you're having trouble juggling the challenges in your life, Sahaja Yoga Meditation might well help you manage stress, master your emotions and find solutions to your problems. You may enjoy better health, better focus, and a deeper understanding of the universe and your place in it.Meditation is not just for mystics and monks. Ready to plug into your inner energy? A few minutes of your life may be all it takes to connect to your inner energy and light the path to lifelong transformation. Sahaja Yoga is more than a temporary solution or quick relief — it is a journey, rather than a destination. All sessions are free. No strings, no catch.Everyone is welcome. 

How is it done? 

– Socialize a bit and know other participants with similar aspirations 

– Introduction – suitable for complete beginners. How to meditate, and balance your inner being– About chakras and techniques to cleanse them 

– Guided meditation & experience awakening of energy. Silent meditation– Silent meditation and on music based of notes suitable for specific energy centers– Going deeper on specific topic, followed by one to one session with guidance on how to continue practice at home and any address any queries you may have. 

In case you miss any of our session, you are always welcome to join our Facebook group for more resources and guided meditation sessions 

https://www.facebook.com/groups/WeMeditateGroup/ 

Need to know more? 

http://www.freemeditation.com/ 

http://www.discoversahajayoga.org/ 

Enjoy and continue RSVPing and keep checking the Meetup as we keep try to keep it afresh with discussions, pictures and newsletter.And should you require any kind of help, please feel free to start discussions or message one of meeting co-organizer.

The Useful Philosophy Cafe is a bi-weekly gathering over tea or brunch in Bangalore designed for people who want to think out loud, challenge their own certainties, and explore the dilemmas of modern life through a philosophical lens. We live in times of "winning" arguments, where we lose finding truth and understanding. If you are tired of shouting matches, spiritual cliches, and shallow mantras, this is your "third space." **What we won't do:** * ❌ Listen to long, academic rambles. * ❌ Debate for the sake of "winning." * ❌ Speak in complex jargon. **What we will do:** * ✅ Ask sharp, insightful questions. * ✅ Challenge what we think we know. * ✅ Enjoy great coffee and even better conversation.

group_name: The Expats (and Diplomats) Club of Singapore (7500+ expats)
group_description: **Welcome to The Expats Club of Singapore!** This is a group for people who would like to find new relationships and make new friends in one of the most vibrant cities! It is open to singles and couples of all ages. We also welcome locals and long term residents with a global/expatriate mindset. I am hoping that we can meet for drinks, dine out and go on holidays! It would be wonderful to build new connections and relationships and make our lives that much more fruitful and fun. Join us and change your life and ours! **Click on the link to have a look at some of our past events** -[ ](https://www.meetup.com/zurich-expat-and-international-singles-meetup/photos/)[Photo Album](https://www.meetup.com/singapore-expats-club/photos/) Here you can see everyone from different cultures and races meeting and having a great time and this is what we tend to achieve everytime we host! **Here is how we will do things differently -** Ever since covid has occurred the world has changed ways in how we function and operate. Meeting people of various cultures has become difficult with various restrictions and with online events people rarely have the opportunity of meeting face to face and this results in not getting the right opportunity to meet in person. We will always have hosts at all our events. You will always be greeted by someone at all our events and introduced to others. (Warm & welcoming hosts to help you mingle!) **Click on the link to know**[ 6 key reasons why you should attend our meetups!](http://bit.ly/attendourmeetups) We will minimize no shows by requiring attendees to pay a deposit in advance. No shows are misleading and not fun for organizers nor for members. We will not disguise organization costs in opaque ticket prices, commissions from bars or inflated set menu prices. We will instead ask for a small charge to help us manage the group and its activities. (Very transparent) We will strive to attract a high quality membership who prefer higher quality venues and events. We will not be driven by happy hours, free food etc (as all of these are eventually balanced out by much higher prices later) We will constantly request members to help us host events and take a lead on activities so that we have energy and variety. **Click on the link to our website and have a look at our other cities that we host in -** [https://meetconnectdevelop.com/](https://meetconnectdevelop.com/) I very much hope that you will join us and create a vibrant social community!

ENGLISH DESCRIPTION AT THE END. Siamo un gruppo di conversazione di circa 30 relatori attivi di livello intermedio o superiore. Ci sono altri 70 partecipanti occasionali. *Non ci aspettiamo che i membri vengano a ogni sessione, ma prevediamo che i membri partecipino almeno 10 volte all'anno.* **I nuovi membri dovrebbero partecipare a un evento entro le prime 6 settimane.** **In caso contrario verranno cancellati.** Siamo un gruppo che mantiene e rinfresca la lingua italiana attraverso la conversazione in un'atmosfera rilassata, solitamente in un bar caffe. Andiamo anche ai film italiani, ristoranti, conferenze, mostre d'arte, conferenze e giri. Un gruppo per italiani, italoaustraliani e per tutti coloro che hanno almeno un livello intermedio di padronanza della lingua. Non insegniamo italiano. Tuttavia ci saranno alcuni eventi a cui i membri potranno portare compagna(o) o amici, che non parlano italiano. Di solito ci sono circa 12 persone per ogni sessione. Per l'adesione è necessaria una foto in stile passaporto. **PARLIAMO ITALIANO - an Italian Conversation Group.** This group is for those who are at least at intermediate fluency in Italian. *We don't expect members to come to every session, but we do expect members to attend at least 10 times a year.* **New members are expect to attend an event within the first 6 weeks.** **If not they will be deregistered.** There are about 30 active members and another 70 occasional participants. The objective is to maintain and improve our capabilities. Speakers should be able to maintain conversations for at least 2 hours. We also go to Italian films, restaurants, lectures, art exhibitions, lectures and tours. This group is for active participants. There are usually about 12 people for each session. There will be certain events at which members can bring a partner or friends who do not speak Italian. We do not teach Italian. However there may be native speakers and qualified teachers within our group who may be willing to do so. A passport style photo is necessary for membership.

Highwaymen Moto-biking group is a professional riding & ride organization group with over a decade of experience in planning & organizing rides. We are proficient in organizing the rides as below: * **HALF DAY RIDES** – Motorbike rides which start as early as 6AM and end by 2PM the same day * **ONE DAY RIDES** \- Motorbike rides which start as early as 6AM and end by 6 \- 8PM the same day * **MULTI DAY RIDES** –Motorbike rides from a minimum of 2 days to a maximum of 14 days. We have organized, ridden & marshalled rides. Some of our longest rides also known as MEGARIDES are as below: 1. Ride to Leh, Ladakh - 2017 2. Ride to Rann of Kutch - 2018 3. Ride to Bhutan - 2019 4. Ride to Rameswaram, Kanyakumari, Megamalai & Valparai - 2022 5. Ride to Rajasthan - 2023 6. Ride to North East - 2024 (Assam, Meghalaya & Arunachal Pradesh) We explore the exhilarating experiences and freedom that comes with riding. From the open road to breathtaking landscapes, discover why motorbiking is a favorite among adventure seekers. So, if you are an adrenaline junkie with at least a 150cc or above bike and looking to explore the world on your bike, come, ride with us. **Why ride with Highwaymen?** **1) Punctuality & Safety** – With over a decade of experience in riding and organizing , we are proud to say, we always start our rides on time and encourage all our riders to be on time too. **Safety** is our topmost priority. We ensure all riders & pillions(if any) always wear full face helmets, riding jacket or jacket with elbow guards, riding pants or jeans with knee guards, riding or sports shoes. If you don’t have it, you can rent from us. **2) Customized rides(trips) & tours** – Based on your needs we plan the itinerary & the breaks. Ranging from a minimum of 30kms to a maximum of 100 kms we help by planning not just rides but also customize the rides to suit your needs **3) LSM formation riding –** We always ride in **L**ead **S**weep **M**oderator single formation riding. We ensure nobody overtakes the lead or falls behind the sweep, the group is managed by a Moderator or Marshall who moderates the speed and navigates the entire group thereby ensuring everyone rides together & no one misses a turning or over speeds while riding. The idea is also to ensure we don’t block traffic. The **LSMs** of  a group are identified by High Visibility Reflective Jackets **4) Backup Vehicle & Doctor  –** We ensure we have a backup vehicle for all type of rides. This is done so that the luggage is placed in the car and the ride experience is enhanced. Puncture kit, first aid kit, tool kit, paddock stand and a mechanic complete the contents of the backup car. All rides also involve an experienced doctor who is part of the ride in case of an emergency **5) DMC communication –** The ride organizing team have Bluetooth with DMC(Dynamic Mesh Communication) feature enabled. This feature helps up to 15 of us to communicate spanning over a km which helps in better coordination during the entire ride even with our helmets on. **6) Requirement** – The only requirement is, the rider must possess a valid 2 wheeler Driving License, the rest-Motorbike & Riding Gear will be arranged by us if needed

group_name: Chiang Mai Conscious Dance Meetup Group
group_description: **Conscious Dance is the practice of first cultivating awareness and acceptance of what is present AND then giving this our authentic, full-embodied expression through movement!** **This Meetup Group is an umbrella in Chiang Mai for the full spectrum of forms this can take! 🎶👣💚👣🎶** **Currently I host 2 sessions each week (as well as other events from time-to-time):** * **\~ DANCEmandala - EVERY Saturday 6-8pm at Chiang Mai Holistic** * **\~ Ecstatic Dance CNX - EVERY Sunday 12:30-3:00 pm at Vivid Dance Studios (2nd floor)** **Folks often ask what the difference is between the two...** **Both fall under the larger umbrella of free-form Conscious Dance, which has been defined as “intentionally non-evaluative mindful movement for purposes of authentic self-expression, self-discovery, interpersonal connectedness, and personal healing or growth" - basically embodied awareness and cultivating feeling at home in one's spirit and soul! Both sessions last about 90 minutes, with a brief ritual circle to begin and end. There are no prescribed steps and so dancers can improvise as they desire. Both are barefoot dances, free from talking or intoxicants, and provide an opportunity to self-reflect and process things in one’s life. The music in each can be quite similar and loosely follows a “Wave” beautifully articulated by Gabrielle Roth as 5Rhythms. Both include a wide range of music that moves from slow & spacious, to fast & intense, then settles back to end in relaxation & rest. In DANCEmandala the high-energy phase is roughly 1/3rd, with a short pause between each track to refocus; in Ecstatic Dance the high-energy phase is about 2/3rds and the music is continuous. Both offer each dancer a journey towards WHOLENESS, with time and space to have their own unique experience.** * **DANCEmandala is structured as MEDITATION, with gentle GUIDANCE throughout intended to deepen mindfulness and self-awareness – it’s an inner journey we take together mostly with eyes closed and without much direct partnering.** * **Ecstatic Dance is not guided and encourages social engagement and partnering, but in which each person is still free to dance completely by themselves.** **DANCEmandala happen Saturday nights (Yin) and is more introspective, while Ecstatic Dance on Sunday mornings (Yang) allows for more interaction…Basically, I love both these practices and how they complement and enrich one another! ☯️** **To learn more, visit https://dancemandala.com/ & Https://ecstaticdance.org/** **If you're interested, do join us or get in touch with me to learn more! 🙏**

Looking for peace, balance, joy, overcome stress, transform and meet other seekers? Welcome to free guided 'Sahaja Yoga' meditation sessions. 


We also have Facebook group to support with more resources. 
Join now! 
https://www.facebook.com/groups/WeMeditateGroup 


Who does it? 
Founded by Shri Mataji Nirmala Devi in 1970 and practiced in over 100 countries. No prior meditation experience is required. 

What is it? 

Sahaja Yoga Meditation is a simple, time-honored technique that lets you tap into that energy and harness its power to become better balanced and better connected to yourself — emotionally, physically, mentally, and spiritually. Anyone can do it. Sahaja Yoga meditation is natural and easy. A structured guided meditation is always included. In this way, you will both experience meditation, and be able to start meditating at home from the first day you start. Beneficial and instructive for both beginners and the experienced. 

Why do it? 

If you're having trouble juggling the challenges in your life, Sahaja Yoga Meditation might well help you manage stress, master your emotions and find solutions to your problems. You may enjoy better health, better focus, and a deeper understanding of the universe and your place in it.Meditation is not just for mystics and monks. Ready to plug into your inner energy? A few minutes of your life may be all it takes to connect to your inner energy and light the path to lifelong transformation. Sahaja Yoga is more than a temporary solution or quick relief — it is a journey, rather than a destination. All sessions are free. No strings, no catch.Everyone is welcome. 

How is it done? 

– Socialize a bit and know other participants with similar aspirations 

– Introduction – suitable for complete beginners. How to meditate, and balance your inner being– About chakras and techniques to cleanse them 

– Guided meditation & experience awakening of energy. Silent meditation– Silent meditation and on music based of notes suitable for specific energy centers– Going deeper on specific topic, followed by one to one session with guidance on how to continue practice at home and any address any queries you may have. 

In case you miss any of our session, you are always welcome to join our Facebook group for more resources and guided meditation sessions 

https://www.facebook.com/groups/WeMeditateGroup/ 

Need to know more? 

http://www.freemeditation.com/ 

http://www.discoversahajayoga.org/

group_name: Co-Founders Matchup - Delhi NCR West Uttar Pradesh Group
group_description: 🚀 Welcome to the CoFounders Meetup Group! 🚀 Are you an aspiring entrepreneur, visionary leader, or innovator eager to transform your ideas into reality? If so, you've come to the right place. Our CoFounders Meetup Group ( Online ) is a vibrant community of like-minded individuals who share a passion for entrepreneurship, innovation, and collaboration. Whether you're at the early stages of developing a startup, seeking a co-founder to complement your skills, or looking for inspiration and networking opportunities, this group is designed to empower you on your entrepreneurial journey. \*\*What We Offer:\*\* 🤝 \*\*Networking Opportunities:\*\* Connect with fellow entrepreneurs, industry experts, and potential co-founders who can help turn your vision into a reality. 🚀 \*\*Inspiring Discussions:\*\* Engage in thought-provoking conversations, workshops, and panel discussions on the latest trends, challenges, and strategies in the startup world. 💡 \*\*Idea Validation:\*\* Share your startup ideas, get valuable feedback, and refine your concepts through constructive discussions. 🌐 \*\*Resource Sharing:\*\* Access a wealth of resources, from funding opportunities to mentorship programs, to accelerate your startup's growth. 🌟 \*\*Success Stories:\*\* Learn from the journeys of successful entrepreneurs who have turned their dreams into thriving businesses. ✨ \*\*Supportive Community:\*\* Join a community that understands the entrepreneurial mindset, where you can find encouragement, advice, and collaboration. Our CoFounders Meetup Group aims to foster a collaborative ecosystem that nurtures innovation and empowers aspiring founders. Whether you're a tech enthusiast, a social entrepreneur, or an industry disruptor, you'll find a welcoming space here to explore, learn, and grow. Join us in this exciting journey of turning ideas into action, and let's build the future together. Be part of a network that believes in the power of collaboration and entrepreneurship. Don't miss out on our upcoming events and opportunities to connect with fellow co-founders and industry experts. Join our CoFounders Meetup Group today and embark on a path of innovation and growth. Let's shape the future of entrepreneurship together! See you at our next meetup! [Raj Sunder Sharma] [Facilitator] [CoFounders Meetup Group] Make your life beautiful and keep spreading happiness. Love and Peace,   Organizer – Every Day is Beautiful, Enjoy it Fullest Welcome to our happy little group where all the Celebrants love life and celebrate it in all its dimensions. Build your Founding Team. Collaborate with other Startups and Founders. If you’re looking for someone to join your venture, looking for a venture to join, or open to either, sign up and attend our local, in-person Meetups to discover the perfect co-founder to round out your team. You’ll meet other entrepreneurs who are as energized as you are about launching a new business and who possess a wide range of unique experiences, ideas, and skills. This group is for those who are Founders , Investors & Looking for Co-Founders or wants to invest money in Our Startups in Delhi NCR, Mumbai Regions .Founders can interact with other Co-Founders in the group . We also believe in peaceful co-existence and letting each one of us thrive without impinging on free will and right of others. Hence there are a few guidelines which each one of us is expected to adhere to: 1. **Respect your RSVP:** We value your time and expect you to value others' time too. If you are unsure of attending a meet up, do NOT RSVP. If your plans change after you have RSVP'ed promptly change your RSVP. If you are unable to change your RSVP, please make the effort of calling the event organizer in advance or texting him/her about your change in RSVP. If there are 3 no shows, we reserve the right to revoke the membership of such members. 2. **Be a sincere participant:** We expect all members to attend at least one meet up in 3-6 months. If you do not RSVP and attend any meetup in 6 months time, we assume that you do not wish to participate in the group and hence, we may remove you from the group. 3. **Treat others with respect:** No inappropriate language, rude/unkind remarks or personal comments please. 4. **No greetings on profile and calls for friendship.** 5. **No unsolicited emails/calls:** Please do not call/email other members with unsolicited business/friendship etc. We monitor the group very closely and any complaint against you from other members regarding inappropriate contact/harassment or unsolicited contact with result in revocation of membership. 6. **Sharing of phone number/email:** We will not share your email/phone number with anyone without your permission. You are responsible for sharing your contact details with other members and any exchanges outside the group. 7. **Show your real self:** We expect you to use your real name and photograph in the profile. Pseudonyms may not be used. Please use an identifiable photograph in the profile.  8. **Share and care:** We encourage you to share your skills, talent, knowledge, wisdom, learning, beauty and experience. 9. **Have Fun:** We believe in spreading beauty and fun and expect that you will experience loads of fun in our group.

group_name: Chalk Walk Event in Delhi NCR
group_description: MaStyle Care presents the first ever Chalk Walk in India which is going to take place on 27 July at 30 Different places in Delhi/Ncr from 7:00 A.M to 8 A.M at your own locality . A Chalk Walk is you reclaiming the street, your freedom. A Chalk Walk is you healing yourself, telling the world, “I have the right to be here. To be me. To walk wherever, whenever, however I please.” So bring a piece of chalk . Write a message to the person who tried (and FAILED) to intimidate you. And submit or tag a photo of your #chalkwalk to ours… We Chalk Walk against street harassment, sexism, racism, domestic violence and gender-based violence. We Chalk Walk to show we share the streets and that we’re all in this together. Kindly join us as a volunteer as you go for morning walk on stop women violence. Event Detail : http://www.mastylecare.org/chalk-walk-india/ How to do a Chalk Walk : http://www.mastylecare.org/amazing-video/how-to-do-a-chalk-walk/

group_name: Pune Social dancing group (Salsa, Swing, Blues, CI etc)
group_description:
This group is for all friendly people who like to or want to dance. You might be a pro dancer, a beginner or an amateur dancer. This group is for you. This group is also for Expat dancers traveling from abroad and want to find a place for social dancing.

Styles of partner dancing proposed to explore: 1) Blues dancing 2) LindyHop and East coast swing dance 3) Salsa 4) Bachata 5) Forro 6) Contact improvisation 7) Argentine Tango 8) Cha-cha-cha 9) Waltz 10) Foxtrot 11) Kizomba 12) Merengue 13) Rumba 14) Zouk 15) Reggae and many more.

=================================================
WE ALSO EXIST ON FACEBOOK!

Please should also join us on FACEBOOK at : (coming soon)

================================================

Aim is to build a community of social dancers in Pune thereby helping people socialize, make new friends and yes of course dance! Every effort will be made to provide all these workshops and dance sessions free or minimal cost to meetup members, but we may have to contribute a bit to pay for the venue. Details will be always put up on the meetup pages :)

We also plan on inviting several other guest instructors, national and international, as and when an opportunity comes up. So please come join this group and lets dance like there is no tomorrow :) Even if you have never danced before, I promise you will be able to dance right after the 1st hour! Please bring a will to dance and socialize with people.

Social dancing changed my life and I am sure it could change yours as well!

Happy dancing!


P.S.

All confirmed sessions have all the details in the description along with payment and registration link. Sessions which do not have a registration link in the description of the respective meetup is a tentative session with a tentative date. If you have questions before coming to a meetup, it is your responsibility to reach the organizer at +91 9820633374 to get all the details clarified.
